title: hypericum officinale
intro: Hypericum officinale, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Hypericaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antidepressant effects. The health benefits of Hypericum officinale include reducing symptoms of anxiety and depression, improving sleep quality, and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of St. John's Wort include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support mental health and well-being.
